title: galium umbellatum subvar. laeve
intro: Galium umbellatum subvar. laeve is a subvariety of the Galium umbellatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It is also known as smooth bedstraw, and its leaves are a key identifying feature. Galium umbellatum subvar. laeve has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which have been reported to have health benefits including reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems.
